childElements.name: CaseSubject
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Case Subject", "placeholder" : "Enter the case subject", "readOnly" : false, "required" : true, "validationRequired" : "Step", "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "pubsub" : false, "message" : { }, "helpText" : "Enter a short description of the case" }

childElements.name: CaseStatus
CasePriority

omniProcessElements.name: Step1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Enter Case Details", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveChangesLabel" : "Save Changes", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "Please fill in the case details below.", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : true, "allowSaveChanges" : false, "autoSaveChanges" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

childElements.name: CreateCaseAction
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "CreateCaseAction", "bundle" : "createCase", "ignoreCache" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "Step1:CaseSubject", "inputParam" : "Subject" }, { "element" : "Step1:CaseStatus", "inputParam" : "Status" }, { "element" : "Step1:CasePriority", "inputParam" : "Priority" } ], "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "inProgressMessage" : "Creating Case...", "postMessage" : "Case Created Successfully!", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : true, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: Step2
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Submit Case", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveChangesLabel" : "Save Changes", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : true, "allowSaveChanges" : false, "autoSaveChanges" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "ariaLevel" : 2, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }
